word: G1227 - διαβλέπω - diablépō - dee-ab-lep'-o - See clearly

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διαβλέπω

- Transliteration: Diablepo

- Phonetic: dee-ab-lep'-o

- Definition:

1. to look through, penetrate by vision

a. to look fixedly, stare straight before one

b. to see clearly

- Origin: from G1223 and G991

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1223 and G991; to look through that is recover full vision: - see clearly.
